utterances.speaker: Lorraine
utterances.text: You know , ever since I was little , I have been able to pick up quarters with my toes .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: By the way , Chandler . I cut you out of all my pictures . So if you want , I have a bag with just your heads .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh , are you sure ? Really ? Because you know , you could make little puppets out of them , and you could use them in your theater of cruelty .
